title: juniperus virginiana var. bermudiana
intro: Juniperus virginiana var. bermudiana, also known as Bermuda cedar or simply Bermuda juniper, is a variety of the eastern red cedar tree native to the coastal regions of Bermuda and the southeastern United States. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties due to the presence of volatile oils and terpenes. The health benefits of Juniperus virginiana var. bermudiana include its ability to help alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote urinary health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although its use should be in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
